name: quarantine-manager
title: Quarantine Manager
description: Inspect extended attributes on macOS files, apps, and folders, then select which quarantined items to clear — individually or in bulk — removing the com.apple.quarantine flag once you've verified the source.
author: nurkamol

commands.name: manage-quarantine
commands.title: Manage Quarantine
commands.subtitle: Quarantine Manager
commands.description: Scan a file, app, or folder for the com.apple.quarantine flag, inspect extended attributes, then select which items to clear quarantine from — individually or in bulk.
